decisionPoints.trigger: Intra-articular distal femur fracture with articular step-off or instability
decisionPoints.action: Discuss distal femur ORIF with attending; document vascular exam and articular reduction goals

decisionPoints.trigger: Distal femur fracture with abnormal ankle-brachial index, expanding hematoma, or ischemic signs
decisionPoints.action: Activate vascular surgery consultation and expedite imaging before definitive fixation per attending
